CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2022 Off Calendar

Petitioners Notice Of Motion And Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Nov-15-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS MANOHAR RAJU, ELISA BAIER, DONNA DOYLE, JOHN DUNBAR, and ROSE SIMS' Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate is Off calendar. The San Francisco bench is recused, and the case has been assigned by the Judicial Council for all purposes to Judge Edward G. Weil of the Contra Costa County Superior Court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
